## How feature requests get prioritized

Lictor's public roadmap lives at [ROADMAP.md](https://github.com/Raffa-jarrl/Lictor-AI/blob/main/ROADMAP.md). Feature requests get triaged into one of:

- 🚀 **Now** (this quarter — committed)
- 🛠 **Next** (next quarter — high confidence)
- 🔭 **Later** (subject to learnings)
- ❌ **Not on the roadmap** — we'll explain why; you can fork

The 5 most upvoted feature requests every quarter get prioritized. Add a 👍 to the issue title-comment if you want to vote.

For **pattern requests** (a specific vulnerability pattern Lictor should catch), use the `pattern-request` template instead — those have a different triage flow because they often turn into a `false-negative` fix in disguise.
